title: Parapara Kaatti Lyrics Yatchan Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Yatchan Parapara Kaatti Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Ranjith & Vijay Yesudas
Lyrics: Pa Vijay

Hey thootherika maalai
Namma thoothukodi aalu
Indha kadal kaathu pola
Dhinam suthi suthi vaaley.

Ada daar daaru daarra
ini aadi kizhipen.
Hey nooru nooru noorra
padam kaati nadipen.
Adangoyya adangoyya
indha gandhi nottu poiya.

Namma kayyil idhu vandhaa
podum aatam thaangadhaiyya
Hey vaaya nee vaaya
pudhu vaesham katta vaaya
Nee vandhu nee vandhu
oru paatedhuthu thaaya.

Apadi aaganum ippadi aaganum
Kazhudha saapidum postera maaranum
Vaada raasa vaada nu
kodambaaam dhaan
Nee vaaya thirandhu koopitta
Vaazhkai sorgam dhaan.

Hey avankitta vaanganum
ivankitta vaanganum.
Aththana payyalayum dhiwaalaakanum
Kuduthakaasa ketkaravan suththivaraan da
En azhuku lungi avuthuthaaren da
Sukkurare namma kattathula
Yethi vida poraan uchathula
Oru potti rendu jetti
en sotthu dhaanle.

Hey thutharika maalai
Andha pazhani malai mela
Avan kayyil ulla velu
Tharum nalladhoru naala

Ada daar daaru daarra
ini aadi kizhipen.
Hey nooru nooru noorra
padam kaati nadipen.
Adangoyya adangoyya
indha gandhi nottu poiya.

Namma kayyil idhu vandhaa
podum aatam thaangadhaiyya.
Hey vaaya nee vaaya
pudhu vaesham katta vaaya
Nee vandhu nee vandhu
oru paatedhuthu thaaya.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Parapara Kaatti'?

The song 'Parapara Kaatti' conveys a lively and celebratory vibe, focusing on enjoying life and having fun.

What is the context of this song in the movie Yatchan?

In Yatchan, this song is a lively number that showcases the characters' joyful moments and adds to the film's energetic atmosphere.

Who are the singers of 'Parapara Kaatti'?

The song features the talented voices of Ranjith and Vijay Yesudas.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics for 'Parapara Kaatti' were penned by Pa Vijay.

When was 'Parapara Kaatti' released?

The song was released on August 6, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Parapara Kaatti', the vibrant energy of the song captures the essence of celebration and joy, making it a perfect dance number. The lively beats and catchy lyrics reflect the carefree spirit of the characters in Yatchan. This duet by Ranjith and Vijay Yesudas evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to join in the fun. The song serves as a reminder to embrace life's joyful moments and celebrate with friends.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Parapara Kaatti from Yatchan is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, featuring the dynamic vocals of Ranjith and Vijay Yesudas. This upbeat track is sure to get you on your feet, blending catchy lyrics with an infectious rhythm. Experience the joy and excitement that this unique collaboration brings to the Tamil music scene!
stanzaMeanings: This is just a playful tune, a light-hearted song.
Hey, the flower garland is like our friendship, it goes around like the sea breeze every day.
I will dance now, I will show you a hundred different moves. This is just a playful act, don't take it too seriously.
This is a fun game that has come to our hands. Hey, you open your mouth and create a new style. You come and sing a song.
This is just a playful tune, a light-hearted song.
It should be like this, it should be like that. The donkey eats and the poster changes. Come on, let's go, life is heaven when you open your mouth.
Hey, we should take from this person and that person. The one who gives is the one who receives. I am wearing my lungi proudly. We will not let go of our pride.
Hey, the flower garland is on that hill. He will give a good day with the wealth in his hands.
This is just a playful tune, a light-hearted song.
I will dance now, I will show you a hundred different moves. This is just a playful act, don't take it too seriously.
This is a fun game that has come to our hands. Hey, you open your mouth and create a new style. You come and sing a song.
